w:r.w:t: in Physical Engineering and Chemical Technologies
State Technical University hold international scientific and practical conference:
International Conference on Advanced Studies in Physical Engineering and Chemical Technologie
International Conference on Advanced Studies in Physical Engineering and Chemical Technologie

th, 2026. The conference is supported by the Academy of Sciences of the Republic of Uzbekistan, Fergana State University, Namangan State University, Tashkent State Technical University, Samarkand State University,

State University, Belarusian National Technical University, Belarusian State University, EGE University, University of Malaya, International Islamic University of Malaya, Novosibirsk State University, and Osh University of Technology
supported the conference organizing process. This conference aims to provide a forum for sharing the latest research achievements and future

Technology research and application. Also, implementing knowledge and interdisciplinary research to support national, regional, and international innovative systems in biophysics, computer engineering, engineering management, artificial intelligence, automation, robotics, etc. All authors are cordially invited to submit articles on research achievements.
will be indexed in the Scopus database.
, Professor, Russian State University named after. A.N.
